_comment: Representative symbols scored by tools/compare_symbol_render.py: each renders through the OpenFL vector path and is compared to its Adobe @4x reference raster. Per-case scale/bg/thresholdPercent/thresholdRms override the manifest defaults. thresholdRms is the meaningful gate; thresholdPercent is report-only (gradient/anti-alias diffs keep it near 100%). thresholdRms values lock in current fidelity as a regression baseline.
